The repo’s own correction note says the celebrated boost was mostly metadata filtering, and the benchmark notes show room routing still behind the stronger no-rooms hybrid baseline.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191525:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-019.md:6915:- **Why it matters for us**: Public would pay for label governance, room drift, reindex churn, and false routing while duplicating capabilities it already gets from spec scoping, typed retrieval, and graph/code-search surfaces.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191526:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-019.md:6916:- **Recommendation**: reject
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191527:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-019.md:6917:- **Impact**: low
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191529:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:4:- **What it does**: The protocol says every session should end with `mempalace_diary_write`, and those diary entries are stored back into the same `mempalace_drawers` collection as searchable documents. The code itself admits raw AAAK degrades embedding quality but still stores it there.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191530:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:5:- **Why it matters for us**: The checkpoint habit is good; the storage choice is not. Public’s stronger model is to keep authoritative session capture in structured save contracts rather than blend compressed reflective text into the same main retrieval plane. If we adopt a diary/checkpoint feature, it should be a separate plane or explicitly down-weighted one.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191531:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:6:- **Recommendation**: reject
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191532:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:7:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191534:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:12:- **What it does**: On April 7, 2026, MemPalace publicly corrected overstated AAAK, palace-boost, contradiction, and rerank claims; the benchmark file explicitly labels hybrid v4 as test-set contamination; the protocol says “never guess.” But most of that honesty lives in docs and benchmark notes, not in runtime evidence-tiering.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191535:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:13:- **Why it matters for us**: Public is already closer to the right direction: confidence floors in `memory_search`, explicit recovery order in `context-server`, and authoritative save rules in `generate-context.js`. The next step is to surface evidence tiers more visibly in memory/status responses so benchmark-only, inferred, and source-confirmed facts stay separated at runtime too.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191536:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:14:- **Recommendation**: adopt now
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191537:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:15:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191538:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:89:What it does **not** currently have is a raw-verbatim-by-default memory posture comparable to MemPalace's drawer model, a first-class wing/hall/room taxonomy for agent memory navigation, a dedicated L0/L1/L2/L3 wake-up stack for context loading, MemPalace-style stop/pre-compact save hooks that actively block to force preservation, or a separate temporal entity-triple knowledge graph with explicit invalidation alongside the main memory store. The comparison should stay anchored to those gaps rather than repeating generic hybrid-RAG analysis already covered elsewhere.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191539:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:160:- What it does: `mempalace_status` returns palace overview data plus `PALACE_PROTOCOL` and `AAAK_SPEC`, while the wake-up stack separately loads L0/L1 context for cheap startup continuity.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191540:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:161:- Why it matters: Public already has resume/bootstrap tooling, but it does not currently use one memory-facing status surface to teach concrete retrieval and save behavior this directly.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191541:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:162:- Recommendation: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191542:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:173:- What it does: the stop hook blocks every N human exchanges and the pre-compact hook always blocks, forcing the agent to preserve key context before loss.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191543:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:174:- Why it matters: Public has compaction-oriented structural transport, but it does not currently enforce a comparable memory-preservation checkpoint before context collapse.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191544:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:175:- Recommendation: adopt now or prototype later, depending on runtime surface
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191547:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:276:- **What it does**: technical description with code evidence
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191548:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:277:- **Why it matters for us**: concrete relevance
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191549:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:278:- **Recommendation**: adopt now / prototype later / reject / NEW FEATURE
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191550:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:279:- **Impact**: high / medium / low
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191552:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:535:- **What it does**: MemPalace makes people/projects/wings a first-class user-facing taxonomy from the start. Public instead grounds retrieval in governed scope fields like `tenantId`, `userId`, `agentId`, `sessionId`, and `sharedSpaceId`.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191553:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:536:- **Why it matters for us**: The shift is not “copy wings.” It is to split identity into two planes: machine-trustworthy internal scope and optional human-friendly aliases/navigation. That would give us MemPalace’s ergonomic browsing without weakening governed retrieval.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191554:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:537:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191555:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:538:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191557:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:542:- **What it does**: MemPalace’s own correction note shows how easily mode boundaries blur: raw mode, rooms mode, AAAK, and unreleased rerank paths were marketed too closely together. Public already encodes stricter guardrails in structured save contracts and confidence floors.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191558:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:543:- **Why it matters for us**: A memory system is not trustworthy if its interfaces blur what is stored, what is derived, what is experimental, and what is benchmark-only. Evidence tiering needs to be part of the product contract, not just a doc habit.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191559:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:544:- **Recommendation**: adopt now
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191560:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:545:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191561:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:606:What it does **not** currently have is a raw-verbatim-by-default memory posture comparable to MemPalace's drawer model, a first-class wing/hall/room taxonomy for agent memory navigation, a dedicated L0/L1/L2/L3 wake-up stack for context loading, MemPalace-style stop/pre-compact save hooks that actively block to force preservation, or a separate temporal entity-triple knowledge graph with explicit invalidation alongside the main memory store. The comparison should stay anchored to those gaps rather than repeating generic hybrid-RAG analysis already covered elsewhere.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191562:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:677:- What it does: `mempalace_status` returns palace overview data plus `PALACE_PROTOCOL` and `AAAK_SPEC`, while the wake-up stack separately loads L0/L1 context for cheap startup continuity.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191563:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:678:- Why it matters: Public already has resume/bootstrap tooling, but it does not currently use one memory-facing status surface to teach concrete retrieval and save behavior this directly.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191564:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:679:- Recommendation: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191565:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:690:- What it does: the stop hook blocks every N human exchanges and the pre-compact hook always blocks, forcing the agent to preserve key context before loss.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191566:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:691:- Why it matters: Public has compaction-oriented structural transport, but it does not currently enforce a comparable memory-preservation checkpoint before context collapse.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191567:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:692:- Recommendation: adopt now or prototype later, depending on runtime surface
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191572:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9813:- **What it does**: MemPalace keeps entity facts in a separate SQLite `knowledge_graph.sqlite3` store while search and wake-up still run against Chroma `mempalace_drawers`. The KG is only used when the agent explicitly calls KG tools; it is not fused into `searcher.py` or the L0-L3 layer stack.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191573:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9814:- **Why it matters for us**: This is the reusable architectural move. Public does not need to replace `memory_search`; it could add a bounded sidecar fact plane for “what was true when?” queries while leaving semantic retrieval, bootstrap, and compaction transport intact.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191574:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9815:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191575:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9816:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191577:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9821:- **What it does**: `add_triple()` dedupes only still-current triples, `invalidate()` closes them by setting `valid_to`, `query_entity(..., as_of=...)` filters by time, and `timeline()` gives a chronological view. The April 7 note explicitly says contradiction checking is not wired into KG operations.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191578:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9822:- **Why it matters for us**: The practical gain is temporal state tracking, not magical truth maintenance. Public should evaluate this as a time-scoped fact API layered on governed memory, not as an “auto-fixes contradictions” system.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191579:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9823:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191580:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9824:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191582:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9829:- **What it does**: `mempalace_status` teaches the agent to query KG or search before answering, and to invalidate old facts when reality changes. The KG is not just storage; it is surfaced as a five-tool operational contract: query, add, invalidate, timeline, stats.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191583:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9830:- **Why it matters for us**: If Public ever adds a fact plane, the bigger win is not only the schema. It is making fact lookup a visible, teachable runtime behavior, the way `session_bootstrap` already teaches structural recovery.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191584:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9831:- **Recommendation**: adopt now
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191585:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9832:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191587:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9837:- **What it does**: Public has causal relations, optional temporal columns on those edges, and correction-driven `supersedes` / `derived_from` linkage. But the exposed tool surface is still lineage-oriented: `memory_drift_why`, `memory_causal_link`, `memory_causal_stats`, `memory_causal_unlink`. There is no entity/predicate/object fact query, no `as_of`, and no fact timeline tool.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191588:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9838:- **Why it matters for us**: The gap is narrower than it looks. Public does not need a wholesale graph rewrite; it needs a separate fact model and a user-facing query layer if we want MemPalace-style temporal recall.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191589:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9839:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191590:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9840:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191592:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9845:- **What it does**: MemPalace normalizes entities with simple string munging, allows fact insertion with optional provenance fields, and relies on protocol discipline rather than hard source contracts. Meanwhile its diary still writes compressed reflective text into the main drawer collection. Public’s JSON-primary save path is stricter about authoritative session capture and scope.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191593:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9846:- **Why it matters for us**: The right transfer is the plane separation, not the loose write path. If Public adopts temporal facts, they should be derived from structured save evidence or explicit approved mutations, not free-form manual assertions mixed with diary-style material.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191594:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9847:- **Recommendation**: reject
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191595:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9848:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191597:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9853:- **What it does**: MemPalace’s palace graph is derived from Chroma metadata like shared rooms and wings; the KG is explicit temporal triples. Public has a similar architectural instinct already: structural bootstrap and routing are separate from memory tools.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191598:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9854:- **Why it matters for us**: We should not collapse code graph, causal graph, and any future fact graph into one “graph feature.” The cleaner design is separate planes with clear query intents.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191599:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9855:- **Recommendation**: adopt now
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191600:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9856:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191603:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9907:- **What it does**: MemPalace keeps entity facts in a separate SQLite `knowledge_graph.sqlite3` store while search and wake-up still run against Chroma `mempalace_drawers`. The KG is only used when the agent explicitly calls KG tools; it is not fused into `searcher.py` or the L0-L3 layer stack.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191604:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9908:- **Why it matters for us**: This is the reusable architectural move. Public does not need to replace `memory_search`; it could add a bounded sidecar fact plane for “what was true when?” queries while leaving semantic retrieval, bootstrap, and compaction transport intact.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191605:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9909:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191606:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9910:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191608:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9915:- **What it does**: `add_triple()` dedupes only still-current triples, `invalidate()` closes them by setting `valid_to`, `query_entity(..., as_of=...)` filters by time, and `timeline()` gives a chronological view. The April 7 note explicitly says contradiction checking is not wired into KG operations.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191609:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9916:- **Why it matters for us**: The practical gain is temporal state tracking, not magical truth maintenance. Public should evaluate this as a time-scoped fact API layered on governed memory, not as an “auto-fixes contradictions” system.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191610:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9917:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191611:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9918:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191613:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9923:- **What it does**: `mempalace_status` teaches the agent to query KG or search before answering, and to invalidate old facts when reality changes. The KG is not just storage; it is surfaced as a five-tool operational contract: query, add, invalidate, timeline, stats.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191614:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9924:- **Why it matters for us**: If Public ever adds a fact plane, the bigger win is not only the schema. It is making fact lookup a visible, teachable runtime behavior, the way `session_bootstrap` already teaches structural recovery.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191615:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9925:- **Recommendation**: adopt now
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191616:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9926:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191618:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9931:- **What it does**: Public has causal relations, optional temporal columns on those edges, and correction-driven `supersedes` / `derived_from` linkage. But the exposed tool surface is still lineage-oriented: `memory_drift_why`, `memory_causal_link`, `memory_causal_stats`, `memory_causal_unlink`. There is no entity/predicate/object fact query, no `as_of`, and no fact timeline tool.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191619:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9932:- **Why it matters for us**: The gap is narrower than it looks. Public does not need a wholesale graph rewrite; it needs a separate fact model and a user-facing query layer if we want MemPalace-style temporal recall.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191620:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9933:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191621:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9934:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191623:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9939:- **What it does**: MemPalace normalizes entities with simple string munging, allows fact insertion with optional provenance fields, and relies on protocol discipline rather than hard source contracts. Meanwhile its diary still writes compressed reflective text into the main drawer collection. Public’s JSON-primary save path is stricter about authoritative session capture and scope.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191624:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9940:- **Why it matters for us**: The right transfer is the plane separation, not the loose write path. If Public adopts temporal facts, they should be derived from structured save evidence or explicit approved mutations, not free-form manual assertions mixed with diary-style material.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191625:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9941:- **Recommendation**: reject
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191626:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9942:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191628:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9947:- **What it does**: MemPalace’s palace graph is derived from Chroma metadata like shared rooms and wings; the KG is explicit temporal triples. Public has a similar architectural instinct already: structural bootstrap and routing are separate from memory tools.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191629:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9948:- **Why it matters for us**: We should not collapse code graph, causal graph, and any future fact graph into one “graph feature.” The cleaner design is separate planes with clear query intents.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191630:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9949:- **Recommendation**: adopt now
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191631:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-015.md:9950:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191633:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:3:- **What it does**: the protocol tells the AI to call `mempalace_diary_write` after each session; entries are stored in `wing_<agent>/diary`, timestamped, then read back by `mempalace_diary_read`. The implementation explicitly notes that raw AAAK is stored even though compressed AAAK degrades embedding quality.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191634:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:4:- **Why it matters for us**: this is the strongest reusable lifecycle idea in MemPalace: a separate “agent journal” lane for cross-session continuity. But it should not replace Public’s main resume/save path; it would be additive.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191635:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:5:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191636:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:6:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191638:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:10:- **What it does**: Public has explicit session recovery APIs, per-session priming keyed by `sessionId`, interrupted-session crash recovery, compaction-time auto-surfacing, and a JSON-primary save contract that treats the live session as the source of truth.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191639:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:11:- **Why it matters for us**: the right takeaway is narrow: consider a raw transcript import lane and maybe an agent journal lane. Do not copy MemPalace’s lifecycle surface wholesale.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191640:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:12:- **Recommendation**: reject
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191641:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:13:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191642:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:87:What it does **not** currently have is a raw-verbatim-by-default memory posture comparable to MemPalace's drawer model, a first-class wing/hall/room taxonomy for agent memory navigation, a dedicated L0/L1/L2/L3 wake-up stack for context loading, MemPalace-style stop/pre-compact save hooks that actively block to force preservation, or a separate temporal entity-triple knowledge graph with explicit invalidation alongside the main memory store. The comparison should stay anchored to those gaps rather than repeating generic hybrid-RAG analysis already covered elsewhere.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191643:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:158:- What it does: `mempalace_status` returns palace overview data plus `PALACE_PROTOCOL` and `AAAK_SPEC`, while the wake-up stack separately loads L0/L1 context for cheap startup continuity.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191644:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:159:- Why it matters: Public already has resume/bootstrap tooling, but it does not currently use one memory-facing status surface to teach concrete retrieval and save behavior this directly.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191645:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:160:- Recommendation: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191646:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:171:- What it does: the stop hook blocks every N human exchanges and the pre-compact hook always blocks, forcing the agent to preserve key context before loss.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191647:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:172:- Why it matters: Public has compaction-oriented structural transport, but it does not currently enforce a comparable memory-preservation checkpoint before context collapse.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191648:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:173:- Recommendation: adopt now or prototype later, depending on runtime surface
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191651:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:274:- **What it does**: technical description with code evidence
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191652:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:275:- **Why it matters for us**: concrete relevance
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191653:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:276:- **Recommendation**: adopt now / prototype later / reject / NEW FEATURE
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191654:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:277:- **Impact**: high / medium / low
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191655:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:2708:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/external/benchmarks/BENCHMARKS.md:176:**What it does:** Stores verbatim session text. Embeds with sentence transformers. Retrieves by cosine similarity.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191656:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:2946:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/external/benchmarks/HYBRID_MODE.md:536:Larger candidate pool gives keyword re-ranking more to work with. If the answer is at position 45 semantically but has perfect keyword overlap, we need it in the pool to promote it. Cost: ChromaDB returns slightly more data per query. Impact on speed: negligible.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191657:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:5715:**What it does:** Stores verbatim session text. Embeds with sentence transformers. Retrieves by cosine similarity.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191660:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16266:- **What it does**: the install/runtime surface only brings in `chromadb` and `pyyaml`; CLI `search` forwards directly into `searcher.search()`, which does a single `col.query(query_texts=[query], n_results=..., include=[documents, metadatas, distances])` with optional `wing`/`room` `where` filters, then reports `similarity = 1 - distance`.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191661:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16267:- **Why it matters for us**: there is no first-class FTS lane, BM25 lane, reciprocal-rank fusion, lexical fallback, or shipped reranker in the actual product search path. MemPalace is a strong raw-vector baseline, but not a richer retrieval architecture than Public.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191662:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16268:- **Recommendation**: reject
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191663:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16269:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191665:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16273:- **What it does**: query-time narrowing is mostly `wing`/`room` filtering plus taxonomy/status introspection; ingest-time routing decides rooms via path match, filename match, or keyword counts. The README correction explicitly admits the “palace boost” was really standard metadata filtering.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191666:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16274:- **Why it matters for us**: the palace language is useful UX, but mechanically it is a pre-bucketing/filtering system. That is reusable as an ergonomics layer, not as evidence of a stronger retrieval engine.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191667:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16275:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191668:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16276:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191670:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16280:- **What it does**: L1 scans drawers in batches, scores only by `importance`/`emotional_weight`/`weight`, sorts descending, caps at 15 entries and 3200 chars, then groups by room. L2 uses `col.get()` with optional `wing`/`room` filters and no ranking at all. Only L3 uses semantic query scoring.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191671:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16281:- **Why it matters for us**: MemPalace’s startup and on-demand “recall” stack is cheaper than search, but it is not session-aware, not temporally ranked, and not query-intent aware. Public’s `session_bootstrap` plus `memory_context` is already more retrieval-native than this layered shortcut stack.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191672:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16282:- **Recommendation**: reject
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191673:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16283:- **Impact**: medium
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191675:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16287:- **What it does**: benchmark code adds room-based distance boosts, keyword-overlap fusion, temporal proximity boosts, and a two-pass assistant-reference flow that reindexes top sessions with assistant turns. The README itself says the public rerank pipeline is not yet fully exposed.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191676:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16288:- **Why it matters for us**: these are real retrieval ideas, but they live at benchmark truth level, not product truth level. The main reusable value is narrow heuristics for hard cases like quoted phrases, person names, temporal ambiguity, and assistant-answer queries.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191677:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16289:- **Recommendation**: prototype later
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191678:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16290:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191680:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16294:- **What it does**: Public exposes a 4-stage pipeline through `executePipeline`, advertises live search channels `vector, fts5, bm25, graph`, initializes hybrid search plus BM25 rebuild on startup, runs weighted BM25 FTS5 over `memory_fts`, falls back from vector to keyword search when embeddings/sqlite-vec are unavailable, and fuses session, recency, causal, co-activation, community, graph, and intent signals during ranking.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191681:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16295:- **Why it matters for us**: for search mechanisms specifically, Public should not copy MemPalace’s shipped search architecture wholesale. The real opportunity is to selectively test a few benchmark heuristics or taxonomy UX ideas against an already much richer hybrid stack.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191682:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16296:- **Recommendation**: reject
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191683:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16297:- **Impact**: high
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191686:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16340:- **What it does**: the install/runtime surface only brings in `chromadb` and `pyyaml`; CLI `search` forwards directly into `searcher.search()`, which does a single `col.query(query_texts=[query], n_results=..., include=[documents, metadatas, distances])` with optional `wing`/`room` `where` filters, then reports `similarity = 1 - distance`.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191687:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16341:- **Why it matters for us**: there is no first-class FTS lane, BM25 lane, reciprocal-rank fusion, lexical fallback, or shipped reranker in the actual product search path. MemPalace is a strong raw-vector baseline, but not a richer retrieval architecture than Public.
/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/research.md:191688:.opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/999-hybrid-rag-fusion-upgrade/001-research-hybrid-rag-fusion-systems/005-mempalace/research/iterations/iteration-005.md:16342:- **Recommendation**: reject
